overview: INOXY 123 Surgical Scrub Unit, Triple, Knee Operated Description: 304 grade stainless steel main structure. 3 Batteries. Knee controlled Soap (Baticon) and Water. Hot – cold water mixer (optional). Water discharge. Anti back-splash design. Adjustable legs. 3 Unit Battery with photocell (optional). 2 Unit baticon chamber with photocell (optional)
